command: cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && rm -f .git/HEAD.lock .git/index.lock && git add bin/daily-agent-report.sh bin/aether-publish-analysis.sh bin/generate-morning-report.sh bin/archive-to-research.sh agents/sam/website/data/feed.json website/data/feed.json && git commit -m 'Fix timestamp format system-wide: -0600 to -06:00 in all feed writers. Retrofix 10 broken timestamps + 3 bad readLinks.' && git push origin main && echo 'DONE'
